text:
Assistant: Subscription cutover is underway (a big task). To use the time well, I'll parallelize a genuinely independent, additive piece in an **isolated worktree** so it can't collide: the persisted receipt store + `llm_calls` ledger that Slice 8's `explain` CLI needs. New files only → clean to integrate later. Launching a Sonnet agent for it. [...] Assistant: Note: `origin/master` advanced to #219 ("status-delta-heartbeats") — relevant since that touches the status surface I'm about to rewrite; I'll rebase onto it before the status cutover. For now the instrumentation storage is new-files-only so base doesn't matter. Re-dispatching that agent to the dedicated tenex-edge worktree.

Assistant: Two agents now running cleanly in parallel (subscription cutover on the main line; instrumentation storage in its own tenex-edge worktree). The status-surface brief is drafted and ready to fire the moment the subscription cutover lands. Monitoring for completions.
